name: Voice Unmute
description: Server unmute a user in voice chat.
author: Kiodium

defaults.successMessage:
{targetMention} was voice unmuted in **{voiceChannel}** by {mention}.
Reason: {reason}
defaults.permissionMessage: You need Mute Members permission to voice unmute users.
defaults.botPermissionMessage: I need Mute Members permission to voice unmute users.
defaults.notInVoiceMessage: {targetMention} is not connected to a voice channel.
